thag3.13:1.2: as many as are assembled here.
thag3.13:1.3: I will teach you the Dhamma:
thag3.13:2.2: Apply yourselves to the Awakened One’s bidding.
thag3.13:2.4: as an elephant would a shed made of reeds.
thag3.13:3.1: He who, in this Dhamma & Vinaya,
thag3.13:3.4: will put an end to suffering & stress.
